label: Intent Identification
description: Does the agent correctly identify the user's intent on the first response?
pass_example: User asks 'how do I reset my password' → agent provides reset steps
fail_example: User asks 'how do I reset my password' → agent asks 'what kind of password?'

label: No Hallucination
description: Does the response avoid making up information not in the provided context?
pass_example: I don't have information about that specific policy. Let me connect you with someone who does.
fail_example: Our refund policy allows returns within 30 days. (when no refund policy was in the context)

label: Specific Next Action
description: Does the response include a specific next action for the user?
pass_example: Click Settings > Security > Reset Password, then check your email for a confirmation link.
fail_example: You should be able to find that in your account settings somewhere.

label: Honest Refusal of Impossible Requests
description: For impossible or ambiguous requests, does the agent say so clearly instead of guessing?
pass_example: I can help with billing questions, but I'd need to transfer you to our technical team for server configuration.
fail_example: Sure, let me try to help with your server configuration. (when the agent has no server knowledge)
